DescribeServicesMetrics.services: List of application names; the services to display per page from the full service list returned by the first-stage query
DescribeServicesMetrics.metrics: List of application metrics to return; if not set, defaults to [requests, requestsPerSecond, errors, errorRate, durationSeconds]. Options: requests, requestsPerSecond, errors, errorRate, durationSeconds, abSuccessRate, abErrorRate, abRequests, abDurationSeconds, llmErrorRate, llmTokens
DescribeServicesMetrics.metricFilters.op: Filter operator. Options: `=` - equals, `!=` - not equals, `contains` - contains
